applied_optimizations.name: k_scale_fallback_fix
applied_optimizations.description: Added fallback from layer.k_scale to self.k_scale (tensor([1.0])) at all 4 mla_decode_fwd call sites to prevent FP8 assertion failure when layer.k_scale is None. Pattern: k_scale = layer.k_scale if layer.k_scale is not None else self.k_scale

notes: Fix already present in base image from previous trial
All 4 call sites verified fixed: (1) forward_extend target_verify, (2) forward_extend draft_extend non-graph, (3) forward_extend draft_extend graph, (4) forward_decode
